evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: industrialize pipelines; implement best practices; validation; quality control; reliability; governance; documentation
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Emphasis on industrialization, best practices, validation, and governance indicates rigour orientation.
evidence.domain_risk: modern data analytics platform; no explicit financial/regulatory language
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: Data platform vendor/service without financial reporting or regulatory signals suggests moderate risk.
evidence.collaboration_width: Data Engineers; Data Analysts; Data Scientists; Product teams
evidence.data_team_maturity: industrialize pipelines; Modern Data Stack; maintain and enrich existing models; established tools
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: Named tools in responsibilities (dbt, Spark, Airflow, Databricks) and scaling focus suggest mid-stage maturity.
evidence.jd_authorship: construct and industrialize pipelines; design semantic layer; implement best practices; maintain and enrich models; Apache Airflow; dimensional modeling
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: Specific technical framing (industrialization, semantic layer, dimensional modeling, specific tools) demonstrates hiring manager perspective.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: Focus on data infrastructure and analytics platform itself.
evidence.autonomy_level: maintain and enrich models; contribute to strategy; collaborate with teams
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: Role frames as executing within established architecture and contributing to decisions, but not setting direction.
evidence.ai_role: feeding AI models; support AI systems
evidence.ai_role_explanation: Candidate builds data infrastructure that AI systems consume, positioning them as ai_enabler.
evidence.testing_framing: ensure data quality; implement best practices of validation and quality control
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality and validation framed as core responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: ensure data quality; reliability; best practices; governance; data lineage; data documentation
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Repeated emphasis on quality, governance, and reliability indicates high loss aversion.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Mix of industrializing existing systems and evolving infrastructure.
evidence.language_gate: Advanced English required for international environment
evidence.loss_aversion: ensure data quality; implement validation and quality control; data governance; data lineage; documentation
